childhood.familyBackground: Older brother of Dhanin Chearavanont. Family founded Charoen Pokphand Group. Member of wealthy Thai family.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: Dhanin Chearavanont의 형. 가족이 Charoen Pokphand Group 설립. 부유한 태국 가족의 일원.
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in agribusiness family environment. Took leadership role in CP Group expansion.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 농업 사업 가족 환경에서 성장. CP Group 확장에서 리더십 역할 담당.

careerTimeline.event: Family's Charoen Pokphand Group expanded animal feed and agricultural operations
careerTimeline.eventKo: 가족의 Charoen Pokphand Group이 동물 사료 및 농업 운영 확장

careerTimeline.event: Became Executive Chairman of CP Group
CP Group diversified into retail, telecommunications, real estate
careerTimeline.eventKo: CP Group이 소매, 통신, 부동산으로 다변화

careerTimeline.event: Manages $5.3 billion net worth in global CP Group operations
careerTimeline.eventKo: 글로벌 CP Group 운영에서 53억 달러 순자산 관리

personalTraits.knownFor: Executive leadership of Charoen Pokphand Group, agribusiness innovation, Asian expansion
personalTraits.knownForKo: Charoen Pokphand Group Executive 리더십, 농업 혁신, 아시아 확장
